Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/effectFnImplicitAny_preview.ts(6,46): error TS377062: Parameter `input` implicitly has type `any` in `Effect.fn`, `Effect.fnUntraced`, or `Effect.fnUntracedEager`. No parameter type is available from an explicit annotation or contextual function type. effect(effectFnImplicitAny)


==== /.src/effectFnImplicitAny_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics effectFnImplicitAny:error
    // @test-config {"diagnosticSeverity":{"effectFnImplicitAny":"error"}}
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.fn("preview")((input) => Effect.succeed(input))

!!! error TS377062: Parameter `input` implicitly has type `any` in `Effect.fn`, `Effect.fnUntraced`, or `Effect.fnUntracedEager`. No parameter type is available from an explicit annotation or contextual function type. effect(effectFnImplicitAny)
